Event

The Case for a Post Health System Brand

March 1, 2021 12:00 - 1:00 PM CT
Webinar

This is part three of our three-part webinar series for health system marketers. Our prediction is that Covid-19 has opened the door for more health systems to explore the idea of becoming a “post health system” brand to better connect with patients and build brand loyalty.

In this webinar, you will learn:

1

What a post health system brand is, and examples of hospitals already using this approach

2

How a post-health system brand can support site-specific and service-line marketing.

3

The five secrets to developing a successful post health system brand

Watch Webinar
